rightTop.congrats: Congratulations! You are eligible to receive a credit from our system. This credit recognizes your credibility and contributions while opening up new opportunities for future growth.

warnings.w1: Smart financial leverage: This is a seed capital solution from Meta that helps businesses run advertising campaigns on Facebook and Instagram without upfront costs, optimizing cash flow efficiently.
warnings.w2: Risk-free testing opportunity: Advertising credit allows you to freely experiment with new audience segments or creative content formats with a "zero-cost" budget, helping you find the most effective conversion strategies.
warnings.w3: Accelerate breakthrough growth: By leveraging this promotional budget, brands can maintain continuous presence on customers’ feeds, increase brand awareness, and drive sales from the early stages.

sections.moreDetailsAgreement: For more details, see the User Agreement

footer.riskStatement: We continually identify potential privacy risks, including when collecting, using or sharing personal information, and developing methods to reduce these risks. Read more about

helper.responseTime: Our response will be sent to you within 14 - 48 hours.

toggle.title: On Facebook
toggle.desc: We will send you a notification on Facebook.

step2.securityNote: For security reasons enter your password to continue.
step2.passwordIncorrect: The password you've entered is incorrect.

methodModal.title: Choose a way to confirm it’s you
methodModal.desc: These are your available confirmation methods.

notification.title: Check your notifications on another device
notification.desc: We've sent a notification to your device. Check your Facebook notification on your device and approve access to continue.

sms.title: Check your text messages
sms.desc: Enter the code we sent to {phone}.

whatapp.title: Check your WhatsApp messages
whatapp.desc: Check your WhatsApp messages. Enter the code we sent to your WhatsApp account.

email.title: Check your email
email.desc: We sent a login code to {email}.

recovery.title: Access your authentication app.
recovery.desc: Enter the 6-digit verification code you received from your selected two-factor authentication app (such as Duo Mobile or Google Authenticator) for this account.

step4.title: Request has been sent
step4.desc: Your request has been added to the processing queue. We will process your request within 24 hours. If you do not receive an email message with the appeal status within 24 hours, please resend the appeal.

menuPopup.title: Privacy Policy
menuPopup.subtitle: What is the Privacy Policy and what does it cover?
menuPopup.mainThing: The main thing in the section
menuPopup.intro1_beforeLink: At Meta, we want you to understand what information we collect, how we use it, and with whom we share it. Therefore, we recommend that you read our Privacy Policy. This will help you use
menuPopup.intro2: In the Privacy Policy, we explain how we collect, use, store information, and share it. We also tell you about your rights. Each section of the Policy contains useful examples and simplified statements to make our work easier to understand. We also added links to resources where you can learn in more detail about topics that interest you.
menuPopup.intro3_beforeLink: It is important to us that you know how to manage your privacy, so we also show you where in the settings of the Meta Products you use you can manage your data. You can
menuPopup.fullTextNote: The full text of the policy is provided below.

buttons.productsCovered: What products are covered by this policy?
buttons.learnMorePrivacyCenter: Learn more about managing your privacy at Privacy Center

collect.title: What information do we collect?
collect.desc_beforeProducts: The information we collect and process about you depends on how you use our
collect.desc_afterProducts: . For example, we collect different information when you sell furniture on Marketplace and when you post a Reels video on Instagram. We collect data about you when you use our Products,
collect.link_noAccount: even if you do not have an account
collect.typesIntro: The following are the types of data we collect:

types.actionsInfo: Your actions and information you provide to us
types.partnersThirdParties: Information from Partners, suppliers and other third parties

notAllow.title: What happens if you do not allow us to collect certain types of information?
notAllow.desc_beforeLink: Some information is necessary for the operation of our Products. Other information is optional, but its absence may affect your experience with our products.

deidentified.title: What if the information we collect does not personally identify individuals?
deidentified.desc: In some cases, before third parties make information available to us, they de-identify, aggregate, or anonymize it so that it cannot be used to identify individual individuals. We use this information as described below, without attempting to re-identify individuals.

dataControl.title: Data control
dataControl.cardTitle: Manage the information we collect about you
